live_migration_support_notes: SQL/PPL has no independent storage feed and depends on the OpenSearch REST substrate; refuse SQL/PPL-specific live claim if REST migration is absent.
primary_method: REST substrate migration with SQL/PPL query replay
initial_snapshot_or_seed: OpenSearch REST index snapshot/reindex/PIT seed; SQL/PPL has no independent storage feed
delta_feed_or_change_capture: SQL/PPL query replay and REST-layer proxy-observed writes through OpenSearch REST profile
proxy_method: SQL/PPL endpoint proxy that delegates storage migration to REST profile
alternate_or_fallback: refuse SQL/PPL-specific live migration claim if REST migration substrate is absent
required_cutover_barrier: REST profile cutover barrier plus SQL/PPL result-shape and diagnostic compare clean
parser_worker_scope: parse donor migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render donor diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to DonorLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; donor feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests donor regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
